info.desc:
The data will be extracted from the directory and then transferred via a secure channel to your institution's e-sidoc portal. This data will then be available for download to the teacher-librarian for 72 hours. It allows for loan management and authentication. Once the transfer is complete, please encourage the teacher-librarian to perform this download within the allotted time.

 If your institution is part of a group of structures, the export will be done for all of these structures.

message.export-exception: An error occured when trying to export from {etab}.
message.export-already-done: {etab} was exported not too long ago, please try again later.
